summary: Comprehensive testing of Alaxico Medical Equipment E-Commerce Platform - Multi-payment method feature, Admin panel product editing with payment methods, and Product detail page like/share buttons. All core features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 520 instead of 403 when no auth token provided
Returns 520 instead of 403 when no auth token provided

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@medequipmart.com / admin123 - SUCCESS
Admin Panel loads with stats (16 Products, 7 Orders, 8 Bulk Enquiries)
Admin Panel - Products tab shows all products with Edit/Delete buttons
Admin Panel - Edit Product dialog opens with all fields populated
Admin Panel - Payment Methods section shows all 5 toggles (Online Payment, COD, Bank Transfer, EMI, Pay Later)
Admin Panel - Payment method toggles are functional (can enable/disable)
Product Detail page - Like button (heart icon) visible and functional
Product Detail page - Like button turns red when clicked, shows 'Added to wishlist!' toast
Product Detail page - Like count displayed (e.g., '1 like')
Product Detail page - Share button visible and functional
Product Detail page - Share dialog shows WhatsApp, Facebook, Twitter, Copy Link options
Checkout page - All 5 payment methods displayed correctly
Checkout page - Payment method selection works (radio button style)
Checkout page - COD selection shows info message about cash payment
Checkout page - Button text changes based on payment method (Pay vs Place Order)
Backend API - /api/payment-methods returns all 5 payment methods with details
Backend API - /api/cart/payment-methods returns available methods for cart
Backend API - /api/orders/create-cod-order creates COD orders successfully
Backend API - /api/orders/create-cod-order creates Bank Transfer orders successfully
Backend API - /api/orders/create-cod-order creates Pay Later orders successfully
Backend API - /api/products/{id}/like toggles like status correctly
Backend API - /api/products/{id}/liked returns correct liked status
Backend API - Admin can create products with specific payment methods
Backend API - Admin can update product payment methods
Backend API - /api/products/{id}/related returns related products
critical_code_review_comments: Razorpay payment integration uses MOCKED placeholder keys (rzp_test_1234567890) - actual online payments will fail until real keys are configured
Products currently don't have payment_methods set (returns None) - admin needs to edit products to set specific payment methods
seed_data_creation: Test orders created via COD, Bank Transfer, and Pay Later payment methods during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-payment method feature fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs working correctly for all 5 payment methods (Razorpay, COD, Bank Transfer, EMI, Pay Later). Admin panel has payment method toggles in product edit form. Product detail page has functional Like and Share buttons. Checkout page displays all available payment methods with proper selection UI. Razorpay integration is MOCKED with test keys.

admin_panel_payment_methods.details: Edit product dialog shows 5 payment method toggles with descriptions

product_like_button.details: Heart icon toggles red/white, shows like count, displays toast notification

product_share_button.details: Opens dialog with WhatsApp, Facebook, Twitter, Copy Link options

checkout_payment_methods.details: All 5 payment methods displayed with icons, descriptions, and selection UI

cod_order_creation.details: COD, Bank Transfer, and Pay Later orders created successfully via API

mocked_integrations.razorpay: Uses placeholder test keys (rzp_test_1234567890) - actual payments will fail
